footer.description: Your trusted partner for premium custom packaging solutions. We specialize in high-quality grey board laminated boxes, gift packaging, and more.

home.experienceDescription: With over 15 years of experience in the packaging industry, Shanghai Douyue Industrial Co., Ltd has established itself as a leading manufacturer of premium custom packaging solutions. We combine traditional craftsmanship with modern technology to deliver exceptional quality.
home.customDesigns: Custom designs with advanced printing techniques
home.fastTurnaround: Fast turnaround and reliable global shipping
home.freeQuoteDescription: Get a free quote for your custom packaging project. Our team of experts is ready to help bring your vision to life.

contact.faq1Question: What is the minimum order quantity?
contact.faq1Answer: MOQ varies by product type. Standard items start from 100 pcs, while custom designs typically require 500+ pcs. Contact us for specific requirements.
contact.faq2Answer: Standard production takes 7-15 business days. Custom orders may require 15-25 days depending on complexity. Rush orders are available.
contact.faq3Answer: Yes! We ship worldwide via sea freight, air freight, and express courier. We can arrange shipping to your preferred port or address.
contact.faq4Question: Can I get samples before ordering?
contact.faq4Answer: Absolutely. We offer sample services for all our products. Sample costs may apply but are typically refunded with your first order.
contact.faq5Question: What payment methods do you accept?
contact.faq5Answer: We accept PayPal and Alipay for international transactions. Bank transfer (T/T) is also available for larger orders.
contact.getInTouchTeam: Get in touch with our team for inquiries, quotes, or support
contact.loveToHear: We'd love to hear from you. Whether you have a question about our products, pricing, or anything else, our team is ready to answer all your questions.
contact.businessHoursValue:
Monday - Friday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM (CST)
Saturday: 9:00 AM - 12:00 PM
contact.respond24Hours: We typically respond within 24 hours on business days

about.professionalDescription: is a professional packaging manufacturer based in Shanghai, China, dedicated to providing premium custom packaging solutions for global brands.
about.foundedPassion: Founded with a passion for quality and craftsmanship, DY Packs has grown from a small workshop into a leading packaging manufacturer serving clients worldwide. Our journey has been driven by a commitment to excellence and innovation in every box we create.
about.specializeIn: We specialize in high-quality grey board laminated boxes, luxury gift packaging, cosmetic boxes, food packaging, and custom solutions for various industries. Our state-of-the-art facility in Shanghai combines traditional craftsmanship with modern technology.
about.everyProject: Every project begins with understanding our client's vision. We work closely with brands to design packaging that not only protects products but elevates the unboxing experience.
about.qualityDesc: We use only premium materials and maintain strict quality control throughout every stage of production.
about.innovationDesc: Continuously exploring new techniques, materials, and designs to keep our clients ahead of the competition.
about.customerFocusDesc: Your success is our success. We provide personalized service and flexible solutions for every project.
about.smallBatchOrLarge: Whether you need a small batch of custom boxes or large-scale production, we're here to help.

carol.welcome:
Hi there! I'm **Carol** from DY Packs. 👋

I'm here to help you with custom packaging solutions. What can I assist you with today?
carol.quoteIntro: Great! I'd be happy to help you get a quote. What type of packaging product are you looking for?
carol.inquiryIntro: Sure! Please tell me what products you're interested in and any specific requirements you have.
carol.browseIntro:
You can browse our full range of premium packaging products on our Products page.

Would you like me to take you there?
carol.askQuantity: Got it! What quantity are you looking for?
carol.askEmail: Perfect! What's the best email address to reach you at?
carol.askDetails: Thank you! Would you like to add any additional requirements or details? (Size, material, design preferences, etc.)
carol.emailBodyStart:
Hi Carol,

I'm interested in getting a quote for custom packaging.
carol.emailBodyEnd:
Please get back to me with pricing and lead time.

Thank you!
carol.thanksDetails: Thanks for providing all the details! I've prepared an inquiry email for you. Click the button below to send it directly to me.
carol.emailClientOpened:
✅ Your email client should have opened with the inquiry draft. If not, you can manually email me at **carolni@dypacks.com**.

I'll get back to you within 24 hours!

hero.customSolutions: Custom packaging solutions crafted with precision and elegance. From luxury gift boxes to specialized industrial packaging — we bring your vision to life.
hero.elevateBeauty: Elevate your beauty line with our premium cosmetic packaging. Magnetic closures, foil stamping, and velvet linings that create an unforgettable unboxing experience.
hero.makeEveryGift: Make every gift memorable with our handcrafted luxury boxes. Perfect for corporate gifts, weddings, and special occasions with fully customizable designs.
hero.ecoConscious: Eco-conscious packaging without compromising on quality. Recycled materials, soy-based inks, and biodegradable options for brands that care about the planet.
hero.experience50Countries: Over 15 years of experience serving clients across 50+ countries. ISO 9001 certified manufacturing with competitive pricing and reliable global logistics.
